title: Airships N Stuff
description:
This modpack is for those who like airships and stuff. 

Primarily built around Valkyrien Skies and Create
body:
### <center> Welcome to Airships n' Stuff!
 <center> 
   
   ##### [Discord](https://discord.gg/qDWxaKgB3u)
   
</center>
<hr/> 

Take to the skies in this adventure and experimenting focused modpack build around Valkerien Skies!


We want YOU to design your dream aircraft! Want to make something that breaks the sound barrier? An absolute unit of a destroyer with a battery of functional  cannons that you can FIGHT OTHER SHIPS WITH? How about a scale model of a real life vessel with funtional propulsion and weapons systems? The possibilities   are  (almost)  limitless in  this pack!
<hr/>

###  <center> Primary  Features

- **⚓ Fully Modular  Airships**   -   Build your vessel exactly how  you  want  it
- **⚔️ CANNONS** - Need I  say more?
- **🗺️ Rich Exploration** - Unearth the secrets of  the underground with  Alex's  Caves
- **🔮 Arcane Discovery** - Unravel ancient arcane magics with Mana &  Artifice 
- **🛡️ Team up or go solo** - Lay claim  to your land with [OPAC](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)
- **And  more!**  - Cant give away all the fun now, can I?
<hr/>

This pack is  primarily built for the official   Airships n' Stuff server, but  dont  let that stop you from embarking on your own singleplayer adventure!
###### (Official server IP address is preloaded into the modpack. Owned by Swiftercat, the Modpack Creator)
